matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-utente-001 title: user logs into the service and navigates to the homepage module: utente source pages: 1 preconditions: user is registered and has credentials. test data: username: testuser, password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters the username and password. 2. user clicks on the login button. 3. system verifies the credentials. 4. user is redirected to the homepage. expected result: user is successfully logged in and redirected to the homepage.

test case id: tc-creazione-001 title: user creates a new object module: creazione source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to create objects. test data: object name: newobject test steps: 1. user selects the "create" option from the menu. 2. user enters the name of the new object. 3. user clicks on the "create" button. 4. system validates the input. 5. system creates the new object. expected result: a new object is created and displayed in the system.
